
Life History {data-navmenu="Model"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Weight at Age

```{r waa_plot}
waa <- mv$weight_at_age
p <- plot_ly()
for (sx in unique(waa$sex)) {
  sub <- waa[waa$sex == sx, , drop = FALSE]
  sc <- mv_sex_colours(sex_names = unique(waa$sex))
  p <- add_lines(
    p = p,
    x    = sub$age,
    y    = sub$est,
    name = sx,
    line = list(color = sc[sx], width = 2),
    hovertemplate = paste0(
      sx, " age %{x}: %{y:.3g} kg<extra></extra>"
    )
  )
}
lay <- modelVis:::.mv_layout()
lay$xaxis$title <- "Age"
lay$yaxis$title <- "Weight (kg)"
lay$title <- "Weight at Age"
lay$showlegend <- TRUE
p <- do.call(what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay))
modelVis:::.mv_config(p = p)
```

### Length at Age

```{r laa_plot, eval=!is.null(mv$length_at_age)}
laa <- mv$length_at_age
p <- plot_ly()
for (sx in unique(laa$sex)) {
  sub <- laa[laa$sex == sx, , drop = FALSE]
  sc <- mv_sex_colours(sex_names = unique(laa$sex))
  p <- add_lines(
    p = p,
    x    = sub$age,
    y    = sub$est,
    name = sx,
    line = list(color = sc[sx], width = 2),
    hovertemplate = paste0(
      sx, " age %{x}: %{y:.1f} cm<extra></extra>"
    )
  )
}
lay <- modelVis:::.mv_layout()
lay$xaxis$title <- "Age"
lay$yaxis$title <- "Length (cm)"
lay$title <- "Length at Age"
lay$showlegend <- TRUE
p <- do.call(what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay))
modelVis:::.mv_config(p = p)
```

### Maturity at Age

```{r maa_plot, eval=!is.null(mv$maturity_at_age)}
maa <- mv$maturity_at_age
p <- plot_ly(
  data = maa, x = ~age, y = ~est
)
p <- add_lines(
  p = p,
  line = list(color = "#1f77b4", width = 2),
  showlegend = FALSE,
  hovertemplate = "Age %{x}: %{y:.3f}<extra></extra>"
)
lay <- modelVis:::.mv_layout()
lay$xaxis$title <- "Age"
lay$yaxis$title <- "Proportion mature"
lay$title <- "Maturity at Age"
p <- do.call(what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay))
modelVis:::.mv_config(p = p)
```
